new_claims.claim_text: Iran is totally defeated. America has all the cards.
new_claims.notes: Strong geopolitical claim, likely strategic narrative. Needs verification.

new_claims.claim_text: USA and Israel can never hack North Korea’s classified information Because Kim Jong Un told officials to keep all the secret information only in small diaries, not on smartphones or computers.
new_claims.notes: Claim about information security based on an unverified premise. Needs verification.
